details: The agent successfully visited all three sites and produced correct answers: (1) Wikipedia — correctly identified Graydon Hoare as the creator of Rust, confirmed by the page text 'Software developer Graydon Hoare created Rust in 2006'; (2) GitHub — found 111,528 stars (well over 100k+); (3) rust-lang.org — extracted the exact tagline 'A language empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.' All three steps completed with accurate data from actual page navigation.
